page: Microsoft Azure EC4ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECADCCV5 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is bundled, consisting of a 154 GB local disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks reveal a contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The server demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance in stress-ng tests, scoring 2699.39, and achieves average results in single-threaded gzip compression, single-threaded bzip3 decompression, and Geekbench single-core evaluations. However, multi-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by lower scores in stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth for both read and write operations on large blocks is also positioned in the lower tier, along with database operations and static web serving throughput.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC4ads_cc_v5 offers a high memory density per vCPU, making it a viable option for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel processing power. The inclusion of 154 GB of local storage provides built-in space for temporary files or caching. Given its strong single-core performance and high memory allocation, this server is suited for single-threaded applications, memory-intensive tasks with low CPU concurrency, lightweight caching layers, and basic text or data processing workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure EC4ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs, 2 physical cores, and a 3.525 GHz clock speed. It features 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, alongside a bundled 154 GB local disk with Premium Storage capabilities. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the server exhibits strong single-core CPU performance in benchmarks, though its multi-core processing and memory bandwidth are relatively weak. This hardware profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive applications that do not demand heavy multi-threaded compute. It is best suited for single-threaded tasks, memory-bound workloads, lightweight caching, and text processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC4ads_cc_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and a 154 GB local disk, optimized for single-threaded and memory-bound workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, high memory-to-core ratios, and integrated local storage for single-threaded workloads.

Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, offering 8.0 GB per core
